title: filago verna
intro: Filago verna, also known as spring cudweed, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its small, yellowish flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Filago verna include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and vitality.
